subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Though the flight of that intimate brother hath brought great sorrow, yet that bird [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان از پرواز برادر آن همراز هر چند اندوه بسیار رخ داد ولی آنمرغ
subcodes.subjects: @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
